name: Vegetarian Spaghetti for Crock Pot
directions: In slow cooker pot, mix dry sauce mix with tomato sauce and water.
Cut zucchini into 1/2-inch crosswise slices.
Peel eggplant, slice thinly and then cut each slice into quarters.
Add all the diced and sliced veggies to the crockpot.
Cover and cook on low 4-6 hours or until vegetables are tender.
Meanwhile, cook spaghetti according to package directions; drain.
Serve sauce on top of cooked spaghetti with mozzarella sprinkled on top.

name: Mema's Spaghetti Salad
directions: Cook the pasta according to package directions; run under cold water and drain well.
Mix everything together in a large bowl and cover.
Refrigerate for at least 12 hours.

name: Crushed Peanut Noodle Salad
directions: Cook spaghetti according to directions on the box.
Drain spaghetti and lightly spray with vegetable oil so it does not get sticky.
Mix peanuts and cilantro in food processor until crumbly.
Mix the peanut/cilantro mixture with spaghetti, green onions, sesame seeds and red pepper.
Mix soy sauce, vegetable oil, honey, salt and sesame oil together in a small bowl.
Pour over noodle mixture.
Toss until the noodles are evenly coated.
Refrigerate salad until cold and ready to serve.

name: Creamy Noodles
directions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions.
In a saucepan, saute garlic in 1 TBS butter until tender. Add cream cheese, sour cream, milk, salt, onion powder, Cajun seasoning, pepper and 2 TBS butter.
Cook and stir over low heat just until smooth. DON'T boil. Remove from heat.
Drain spaghetti and toss with cream sauce. Sprinkle with parsley.

name: Hawaiian Spaghetti
directions: Brown meat,onions,green pepper and mushrooms.When done add the sugar.Drain meat before adding sugar if necessary.
Add pineapple.
Cook pasta about 5 minutes or so.Not all the way through.Drain.Do not rinse.
In a separate bowl,combine gravy and soy sauce.
Mix all together.Put in covered casserole (Pam it,if you like)
Bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 45 minutes.

name: Spaghetti Salad
directions: Break spaghetti in half and cook as directed; rinse in cold water.
In large bowl mix remaining ingredients, add tomatoes last.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours.

name: Baked Spaghetti (Joyce's)
directions: Combine spaghetti, eggs, parmesan and parsley.
Spread into 9 x 12 pan, making 2 layers with mozarella in between and on top.  (Makes 2 pans)
Bake at 350 for 20 minutes.
Cut into squares and serve with hot pasta sauce.
